system: Canonical UI — un-branded, token-driven web components
law: The ONLY legal visual surface is the --ui-sys-* token layer.
Assemble screens from the real components below; never reimplement one in markup/CSS.
A component reads only --ui-sys-* tokens. No component stylesheet, no utility classes, no inline color/size.
If a need isn't covered by a component or expressible via a token, that is a gap to add to this manifest — not a one-off hack.

coverage.note: Parity with MD3's web surface (native) plus the blanks MD3 left (gapFill). All entries below are status:built.

icon.summary: Icon sizing primitive. Wraps an inline SVG/glyph and forces it to a token size (sm/md/lg/xl via --ui-sys-icon-size-*); inherits currentColor. The ONE place icon px live.

app-shell.summary: CSS-grid app layout host. Slots header/nav/(main)/aside/footer; empty side/header/footer tracks auto-collapse via slotchange (no-* host attrs). main scrolls. Works with 0, 1, or 2 side columns.

sidebar.summary: Collapsible left nav. ui-sidebar animates width via --ui-sys-sidebar-width (208px) <-> --ui-sys-sidebar-width-collapsed (64px) with a built-in chevron toggle (emits toggle{collapsed}); pushes 'sidebar-collapsed' to items via MutationObserver. ui-sidebar-item: icon (slot, sized via --ui-sys-icon-size-md) + label expanded; centered icon-only + hover tooltip when collapsed; active = primary-container pill; aria-current.

props.name: active
props.note: on item

props.name: href
props.note: on item

props.name: disabled
props.note: on item

inspector.summary: Right-hand detail/inspector panel (second sidebar). ~320px when open; animates to width 0 / hidden when closed (removed from tab order). Slots title/(content)/actions; built-in close × emits close. role=complementary.

status-bar.summary: Footer/status bar. Default slot left-aligned groups, 'end' slot right-aligned; caption ink on surface-container with top border. role=contentinfo.

button.summary: Primary action control; filled/tonal/outlined/text variants, neutral/danger tones, state layer, focus ring, form-associated.

props.name: tone
props.note: danger = destructive action; reads --ui-sys-neg/-neg-border-soft (sealed btn-danger surfaces: delete stakeholder, confirm Delete)

icon-button.summary: Circular icon button; standard/filled/tonal/outlined variants, optional selected toggle (aria-pressed).

fab.summary: Floating action button; small/medium/large sizes, primary/surface variants, extended via label, elevation-3.

text-field.summary: Text input; outlined variant with floating label, plain variant for label-less chrome-light inline fields (hairline outline strengthening on focus), leading/trailing slots, error state, supporting text, form-associated.

radio.summary: Radio grouped by name; selecting unchecks siblings; arrow-key group navigation; form-associated.

switch.summary: Toggle switch; animated pill track + handle via track/handle tokens; form-associated.

slider.summary: Horizontal range slider; filled track + draggable handle; pointer + keyboard (arrows/Home/End); form-associated.

select.summary: Outlined dropdown for short fixed sets; paired with ui-option; token-styled popup; combobox/listbox ARIA.

menu.summary: Action menu anchored to a trigger by id; paired with ui-menu-item (leading icon, disabled); full keyboard nav.

chip.summary: Chip variants assist/filter/input/suggestion (interactive: pill shape; filter toggles primary-container; input removable; paired with ui-chip-set) PLUS the sealed presentational pill variants priority/zone/tag (Shared-UI-primitives): non-interactive caption-type pills with no state layer/tabstop/role. priority reads --ui-sys-priority-{high|medium|low}-surface/-ink via the value attr (case-insensitive; unknown falls back to the Low pair). zone reads the 14 single-sourced --ui-sys-zone-* fills + band inks via data-zone = the exact zone name, with the SEALED NULL-GUARD: an uncatalogued zone renders NOTHING. tag is the quiet surface-container tag pill. These variants are the ONE source of pill visuals — screens compose them, never hand-rolled spans.

props.name: value
props.note: priority variant only; matched case-insensitively; unknown/absent falls back to the Low pair (sealed PriorityPill rule)

props.name: data-zone
props.note: zone variant only; the exact relationship-zone name (one of the 14 catalogued zones); unknown renders nothing (sealed StatusPill null-guard)

status-dot.summary: The sealed StatusDot primitive (Shared-UI-primitives box): a 7px round dot + the value text as its label, non-interactive. Colors: Active reads --ui-sys-pos, Watch reads --ui-sys-accent, Dormant AND any unknown value read --ui-sys-status-dormant. NULL-GUARD: an absent/empty value renders nothing.

props.name: value
props.note: the label text; unknown non-empty values render with the Dormant grey dot; empty/absent renders nothing

list.summary: Vertical list; ui-list-item with leading/supporting/trailing slots and interactive (button-like) mode.

tabs.summary: Tab bar with animated active indicator; paired with ui-tab; arrow-key nav; emits change with index.

divider.summary: Thin separator; horizontal/vertical, optional inset; role=separator.

dialog.summary: Modal dialog; scrim, animated card, focus trap (native + ui-* hosts, card fallback focus), Esc dismiss; headline/body/actions slots; show()/close(). Stackable: set the --ui-dialog-layer CSS property on a host to raise a stacked dialog (e.g. a delete-confirm) so its scrim covers the dialog beneath — clicks/Esc around the stacked card can never reach the lower dialog.

props.name: --ui-dialog-layer
props.note: z-lift for stacked dialogs; scrim = 900+layer, card = 901+layer

tooltip.summary: Floating label on hover/focus; wraps a child or targets an anchor by id; aria-describedby wiring.

snackbar.summary: Transient bottom-center message; optional action slot; auto-dismiss timeout; role=status live region; show().

progress.summary: Determinate + indeterminate progress; linear bar and circular SVG; role=progressbar.

autocomplete.summary: Typeahead combobox; outlined field + filtered popup listbox; substring highlight; full keyboard nav. options set via property.

props.name: options
props.note: set via JS property

data-table.summary: Tokened semantic data grid (MD3 has none); sticky header, sortable columns, optional checkbox selection, comfortable/compact density. columns+data set via properties.

props.name: columns
props.note: set via JS property

props.name: data
props.note: set via JS property

chart.summary: Inline-SVG chart (MD3 has none); bar/line/area; grid + axis labels; re-skins via computed tokens. data set via property or values attr.

props.name: data
props.note: set via JS property

props.name: values
props.note: comma-list fallback

app-bar.summary: Top app bar (dropped from MD3 web); leading/title/trailing slots; flat/elevated variant; role=banner.

nav-rail.summary: Vertical desktop side rail (dropped from MD3 web); ui-nav-item with pill active indicator; emits navigate.

nav-drawer.summary: Slide-in nav drawer (dropped from MD3 web); modal adds scrim+elevation-3+Esc; toggle()/close().

sheet.summary: Mobile bottom sheet (MD3 web has none); drag-handle, scrim, swipe-down/Esc/scrim-tap close; show()/close().

bottom-bar.summary: Mobile bottom navigation (MD3 web has none); ui-bottom-item with pill active indicator; emits navigate.

date-picker.summary: Calendar date picker (dropped from MD3 web); outlined trigger + month popup; grid keyboard nav; emits change.

props.name: value
props.note: ISO YYYY-MM-DD

stakeholder-table.summary: The Stakeholdr master sheet at the FULL sealed Lists spec. CSS max-content grid (no fixed widths — frozen sticky lefts MEASURED after layout): frozen idx/edit/Stakeholder/Organization + the 22 sealed reorderable columns (drag-to-reorder, persisted per-device to localStorage hp_map_col_order_v3; unknown keys dropped, new appended). Inline edit cells: ui-select-style dropdowns for Category/Type/Market/Region/Geography/State/Site/Status with the sealed cascades (Category resets Type; Market resets Region; Site fills State), inline text Organization (mirrors into name for non-persons), popover-calendar Last contact (YYYY-MM-DD). Display cells per the sealed emphasis map: Issues/Tags first-3+N chips, priority pills (--ui-sys-priority-*), owner avatar stack, zone pill (--ui-sys-zone-*), toned x/y, mailto/tel/x.com/Visit-Website anchors (sealed cleaning rules), notes preview. Toolbar: search (displayName/name/org/type/notes/tags), Filter popover (6 sections, OR-within/AND-across, Priority+Status HARDCODED, Zone in STATUS_ORDER; Clear all cross-clears Categories, never Sites/bands), Sort popover (the sealed 11 fields; custom priority/status/site orderings), Categories + Sites multiselects, 3 live impact-band chips (winnable-middle swatch = --ui-sys-neu). Header-click sort on every field-bearing column (asc ↑ / desc ↓); default sort = unscored first, then lastContact desc. Footer: filtered-of-total, Avg x/y (1 dp) over the filtered set, Export CSV (sealed column set + escaping + filename rule). Pure logic (filters, comparators, CSV, column-order merge, name/phone/url helpers) is exported for unit tests. Bare tag renders a gallery sample. COMPOSITION RULING (2026-07-03): display cells are lightweight shadow-DOM renders for grid performance (industry grid practice); every INTERACTIVE surface composes the REAL design-system elements — toolbar search = ui-text-field variant=plain (leading search ui-icon + kbd chip), Filter/Sort/Categories/Sites = ui-button outlined with a count ui-badge (text + badge only, no leading icons), impact bands = ui-chip variant=filter, Export CSV / Clear all = ui-button variant=text, edit cell = ui-icon-button standard, and clicking a dropdown/date display cell mounts a REAL pre-opened ui-select / ui-date-picker editor in the cell (commit on change, unmount on close). Owner cell opens the sealed OwnersDisplay popover (ui-avatar rows, singularizing head count, outside-mousedown close).

props.name: data
props.note: set via JS property; rows carry the stakeholder fields plus computed _x/_y/_status/_unscored and community (affiliated engagement names)

props.name: catalogs
props.note: set via JS property: { CATEGORIES, MARKETS, GEOGRAPHIES, US_STATES, SITES, siteLabel }

props.name: users
props.note: set via JS property; resolves owner avatars/names (an unresolvable owner id exports as the raw id)

props.name: workspaceLabel
props.note: set via JS property; feeds the sealed CSV filename rule (empty → stakeholders.csv)

props.name: kbd-label
props.note: attribute/property (kbdLabel); the search kbd hint text. NOT derived inside the component — the page passes the store's exported single source (src/app/data/store.js → cmdKeyLabel). Empty/absent hides the chip.

events.name: row-change
events.note: EVERY inline edit flows out here — the page owns persistence through the one Store seam

events.name: notes-open
events.note: notes cell click — the page hosts the Notes modal

events.name: selection-change
events.note: row click; selection lifts to the page (shared with Map/Scoring)

events.name: open-record
events.note: edit icon / name double-click — the full record surface

events.name: community-open
events.note: community-investment pill click (census C5 make-real: never a dead span)

events.name: export-csv
events.note: fired alongside the browser download of the current filtered/sorted set

stakeholder-map.summary: The Stakeholdr map — heat/scatter combo. 4x6 relationship-zone heatmap (14 zones via zone tokens) with stakeholders scatter-plotted by (x,y) [left=((x+10)/20), top=((10-y)/20)], zone labels + per-cell counts, axis legend, and a strategy detail panel (status pill, coords, strategy title+action, category). statusFor(x,y) lookup. .data overrides sample seed.

props.name: data
props.note: set via JS property [{name,x,y}]

avatar.summary: Identity circle: photo (src) or initials derived from name (first+last). size sm/md/lg via --ui-sys-avatar-size-*; fill --ui-sys-primary/on-primary so it re-themes with the wrapper; role=img aria-label=name. The ONE avatar primitive — owner stacks/profile menus compose from it.

textarea.summary: Outlined multiline text field, visually consistent with ui-text-field; floating label, error state, supporting text, rows, maxlength with live right-aligned 'N / MAX' counter (error ink at limit), optional auto-grow, form-associated.

badge.summary: Count/dot notification indicator (oracle msg-badge/count-alert): accent pill ~16px with 9.5px weight-600 tabular numerals, caps at 99+, hidden when count is 0/absent unless dot; inline on its own or anchored -4px/-4px over a wrapped child's top-right corner (nav items, icon buttons, avatars, list rows); non-interactive (pointer-events none); tones alert/neutral via --ui-sys-badge-* tokens; auto aria-label "N notifications" on an inner role=status, overridable via host aria-label.

props.name: count
props.note: badge hides when 0/absent unless dot; values above 99 render as 99+

props.name: dot
props.note: dot-only marker, shown regardless of count

props.name: aria-label
props.note: overrides the auto "N notifications" label (dot: "New notifications")

owner-picker.summary: Owner avatar multi-select (the oracle's MultiOwnerPicker + UserAutocomplete-add + OwnersDisplay read-only stack). Overlapping ui-avatar circles, no names; dashed '+' (hidden when no candidates) opens an inline typeahead over candidates (name/title/email match, max 8, ArrowUp/Down/Enter/Escape, outside-click close, 'Search people to add…', autofocus); avatar click ARMS removal (neg ring + X overlay, 'Click to remove'), second click removes; system-role users and existing owners excluded from the add list. readonly = display-only stack with '+N' overflow past max. Emits change with detail { value }. Composes ui-avatar + ui-icon.

props.name: users
props.note: set via JS property; array of { id, name, title?, email?, src?, role? } — role 'system' never appears in the add list

props.name: value
props.note: set via JS property; array of owner user ids

props.name: size
props.note: maps to --ui-sys-avatar-size-sm/-md

props.name: max
props.note: readonly overflow cap before the '+N' circle

coachmark.summary: Anchored spotlight callout for first-run product tours; scrim with box-shadow cutout leaving the anchor prominent; card with heading, body slot, step counter, Back/Next-Done, dismiss ×; Esc dismisses; focus moves in on open and restores on close; emits next/back/dismiss.

props.name: for
props.note: id of the target element to spotlight

props.name: step
props.note: 1-based current step; Back hidden on step 1

props.name: steps
props.note: total steps; Next becomes Done on the last step; counter reads "step of steps"

events.name: next
events.note: Next/Done clicked; host advances step or closes on last step

events.name: dismiss
events.note: × button or Escape; component also closes itself

card.summary: Content surface; outlined/filled/elevated variants; media/body/actions slots; `interactive` makes the whole card clickable (state layer, focus ring, role=button, Enter/Space). Reads --ui-sys-surface-card / -surface-container, --ui-sys-shape-card, --ui-sys-outline-subtle, --ui-sys-elevation-1.

upload.summary: File-pick control (the oracle's label-wrapped hidden file input, stakeholder-modal photo row). Composes a real ui-button (default slot = label text, e.g. 'Upload photo'/'Replace photo') over a HIDDEN native file input inside the shadow root (the one legal home for the raw primitive under the app-code composition guard). Reads the first picked file via FileReader.readAsDataURL and emits change {dataUrl, name}; input clears after each read so re-picking the same file fires again.

props.name: accept
props.note: passed to the file input (e.g. 'image/*')

props.name: variant
props.note: forwarded to the composed ui-button

events.name: change
events.note: composed: true; first selected file as a data URL
